title: In Custody By Anita Desai | Summary In Hindi | BA Eng Hons
description:
Anita Desai's *In Custody* drops its protagonist Deven into one of literature's cruelest traps — a devoted admirer of Urdu poetry who finally meets his idol, the legendary poet Nur, only to find a bloated, chaotic shadow of the genius he worshipped. The novel cuts deep into themes of cultural decay and failed idealism, asking whether a dying language can be saved by people too broken to save themselves — making it essential reading for BA English Honours students at DU, SOL, and IGNOU. If you've been searching for *In Custody* by Anita Desai summary in Hindi, this is the breakdown that finally makes Deven's tragedy land.
